attributes.name: theme
attributes.description: Specify a theme for this component and all of its children

attributes.name: collapse
attributes.description: Morphs the component into a collapsed state, reducing its maximum width.

attributes.name: flat
attributes.description: Removes the component's **box-shadow**.

attributes.name: height
attributes.description: Sets the height for the component

attributes.name: extension-height
attributes.description: Designate an explicit height for the `extension` slot.

attributes.name: floating
attributes.description: Applies **display: inline-flex** to the component.

attributes.name: image
attributes.description: The `src` used for `v-img`. For additional customization options, use the **image** slot.

attributes.name: prominent
attributes.description: Increases the height of the component content to the value of the **prominentHeight** prop.

attributes.name: prominent-height
attributes.description: Designate an explicit height when using the **prominent** prop.

attributes.name: border
attributes.description: Applies border styles to component.

attributes.name: density
attributes.description: Adjusts the spacing within the component. Available options are: **default**, **comfortable**, and **compact**.

attributes.name: elevation
attributes.description: Designates an elevation applied to the component between 0 and 24. You can find more information on the [elevation page](/styles/elevation).

attributes.name: tag
attributes.description: Specify a custom tag used on the root element.

slots.name: extension
slots.description: Slot positioned directly under the main content of the toolbar. Height of this slot can be set explicitly with the **extension-height** prop.

attributes.name: tag
attributes.description: Specify a custom tag used on the root element.

attributes.name: border
attributes.description: Puts a border on the alert. Accepts **top** \| **right** \| **bottom** \| **left**.

attributes.name: close-icon
attributes.description: Change the default icon used for **dismissible** alerts.

attributes.name: close-label
attributes.description: Text used for *aria-label* on **dismissible** alerts. Can also be customizing globally in [Internationalization](/customization/internationalization).

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description: Designates a specific icon.

attributes.name: prominent
attributes.description: Displays a larger vertically centered icon to draw more attention.

attributes.name: text
attributes.description: Applies the defined **color** to text and a low opacity background of the same.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: Specify a **success**, **info**, **warning** or **error** alert. Uses the contextual color and has a pre-defined icon.

attributes.name: density
attributes.description: Adjusts the spacing within the component. Available options are: **default**, **comfortable**, and **compact**.

attributes.name: elevation
attributes.description: Designates an elevation applied to the component between 0 and 24. You can find more information on the [elevation page](/styles/elevation).

attributes.name: absolute
attributes.description: Applies **position: absolute** to the component.

attributes.name: bottom
attributes.description: Aligns the component towards the bottom.

attributes.name: fixed
attributes.description: Applies **position: fixed** to the component.

attributes.name: left
attributes.description: Aligns the component towards the left.

attributes.name: position
attributes.description: Specifies the type of positioning method used for an element. Available options are: **static**, **relative**, **fixed**, **absolute**, and **sticky**.

attributes.name: right
attributes.description: Aligns the component towards the right.

attributes.name: top
attributes.description: Aligns the content towards the top.

attributes.name: tile
attributes.description: Removes the component's border-radius.

attributes.name: tag
attributes.description: Specify a custom tag used on the root element.

attributes.name: theme
attributes.description: Specify a theme for this component and all of its children

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Applies specified color to the control - it can be the name of material color (for example `success` or `purple`) or css color (`#033` or `rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.5)`). You can find list of built in classes on the [colors page](/styles/colors#material-colors).

attributes.name: text-color
attributes.description: Applies a specified color to the control text

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Applies one of 4 styles, default, contained, outlined, and text.

events.name: input
events.description: The updated bound model

slots.name: append
slots.description: Slot for icon at end of alert.

slots.name: close
slots.description: Slot for icon used in **dismissible** prop.

slots.name: prepend
slots.description: Slot for icon at beginning of alert.

attributes.name: left
attributes.description: Designates that the avatar is on the left side of a component. This is hooked into by components such as [v-chip](/components/chips) and [v-btn](/components/buttons).

attributes.name: right
attributes.description: Designates that the avatar is on the right side of a component. This is hooked into by components such as [v-chip](/components/chips) and [v-btn](/components/buttons).

attributes.name: density
attributes.description: Adjusts the spacing within the component. Available options are: **default**, **comfortable**, and **compact**.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Sets the height and width of the component. Default unit is px. Can also use the following predefined sizes: **x-small**, **small**, **default**, **large**, and **x-large**.

attributes.name: tag
attributes.description: Specify a custom tag used on the root element.

attributes.name: bordered
attributes.description: Applies a **2px** by default and **1.5px** border around the badge when using the **dot** property.

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Defines the background color of the badge.

attributes.name: content
attributes.description: Text content to show in the badge.

attributes.name: dot
attributes.description: Reduce the size of the badge and hide its contents.

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description: Designates a specific icon to render in the badge.

attributes.name: inline
attributes.description: Moves the badge to be inline with the wrapping element. Supports the usage of the **left** prop.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: The **aria-label** used for the badge.

attributes.name: location
attributes.description: Changes the location of the badge. Possible values are **top-right**, **bottom-right**, **bottom-left**, **top-left**.

attributes.name: max
attributes.description: Sets the maximum number allowed when using the **content** prop with a `number` like value. If the content number exceeds the maximum value, a `+` suffix is added.

attributes.name: offset-x
attributes.description: Offset the badge on the x-axis.

attributes.name: offset-y
attributes.description: Offset the badge on the y-axis.

attributes.name: text-color
attributes.description: Defines the text color of the badge.

attributes.name: tag
attributes.description: Specify a custom tag used on the root element.

slots.name: badge
slots.description: The slot used for the badge's content.

attributes.name: avatar
attributes.description: Designates a specific src image to pass to the thumbnail.

events.description: Emitted when close icon is clicked

events.name: update:active
events.description: Emitted when close icon is clicked, sets active to `false`

attributes.name: defaults
attributes.description: Specify new default prop values for components. Keep in mind that this will be merged with previously defined values

attributes.name: fullscreen
attributes.description: Changes layout for fullscreen display.

attributes.name: origin
attributes.description: Sets the transition origin on the element. You can find more information on the MDN documentation [for transition origin](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/transform-origin).

attributes.name: retain-focus
attributes.description: Tab focus will return to the first child of the dialog by default. Disable this when using external tools that require focus such as TinyMCE or vue-clipboard.

attributes.name: scrollable
attributes.description: When set to true, expects a `v-card` and a `v-card-text` component with a designated height. For more information, check out the [scrollable example](/components/dialogs#scrollable).

attributes.name: height
attributes.description: Sets the height for the component.

attributes.name: max-height
attributes.description: Sets the maximum height for the component.

attributes.description: Sets the maximum width for the component.

attributes.name: min-height
attributes.description: Sets the minimum height for the component.

attributes.name: min-width
attributes.description: Sets the minimum width for the component.

attributes.name: width
attributes.description: Sets the width for the component.

attributes.name: transition
attributes.description: Sets the component transition. Can be one of the [built in transitions](/styles/transitions) or one your own.

events.name: click:outside
events.description: Event that fires when clicking outside an active dialog.

events.name: input
events.description: The updated bound model

events.name: keydown
events.description: Event that fires when key is pressed. If dialog is active and not using the **persistent** prop, the **esc** key will deactivate it.

slots.name: activator
slots.description: When used, will activate the component when clicked (or hover for specific components). This manually stops the event propagation. Without this slot, if you open the component through its model, you will need to manually stop the event propagation

attributes.name: inset
attributes.description: Adds indentation (72px) for **normal** dividers, reduces max height for **vertical**.

attributes.name: length
attributes.description: Sets the dividers length. Default unit is px.

attributes.name: thickness
attributes.description: Sets the dividers thickness. Default unit is px.

attributes.name: vertical
attributes.description: Displays dividers vertically.

attributes.name: cols
attributes.description: Sets the default number of columns the component extends. Available options are: **1 -> 12** and **auto**.

attributes.name: sm
attributes.description: Changes the number of columns on small and greater breakpoints.

attributes.name: md
attributes.description: Changes the number of columns on medium and greater breakpoints.

attributes.name: lg
attributes.description: Changes the number of columns on large and greater breakpoints.

attributes.name: xl
attributes.description: Changes the number of columns on extra large and greater breakpoints.

attributes.name: offset
attributes.description: Sets the default offset for the column.

attributes.name: offset-sm
attributes.description: Changes the offset of the component on small and greater breakpoints.

attributes.name: offset-md
attributes.description: Changes the offset of the component on medium and greater breakpoints.

attributes.name: offset-lg
attributes.description: Changes the offset of the component on large and greater breakpoints.

attributes.name: offset-xl
attributes.description: Changes the offset of the component on extra large and greater breakpoints.

attributes.name: order
attributes.description: Sets the default [order](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/order) for the column.

attributes.name: order-sm
attributes.description: Changes the order of the component on small and greater breakpoints.

attributes.name: order-md
attributes.description: Changes the order of the component on medium and greater breakpoints.

attributes.name: order-lg
attributes.description: Changes the order of the component on large and greater breakpoints.

attributes.name: order-xl
attributes.description: Changes the order of the component on extra large and greater breakpoints.

attributes.name: align-self
attributes.description: Applies the [align-items](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/align-items) css property. Available options are: **start**, **center**, **end**, **auto**, **baseline** and **stretch**.

attributes.name: tag
attributes.description: Specify a custom tag used on the root element.

attributes.name: fluid
attributes.description: Removes viewport maximum-width size breakpoints.

attributes.name: tag
attributes.description: Specify a custom tag used on the root element.

attributes.name: dense
attributes.description: Reduces the gutter between `v-col`s.

attributes.name: no-gutters
attributes.description: Removes the gutter between `v-col`s.

attributes.name: align
attributes.description: Applies the [align-items](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/align-items) css property. Available options are: **start**, **center**, **end**, **baseline** and **stretch**.

attributes.name: align-sm
attributes.description: Changes the **align-items** property on small and greater breakpoints.

attributes.name: align-md
attributes.description: Changes the **align-items** property on medium and greater breakpoints.

attributes.name: align-lg
attributes.description: Changes the **align-items** property on large and greater breakpoints.

attributes.name: align-xl
attributes.description: Changes the **align-items** property on extra large and greater breakpoints.

attributes.name: justify
attributes.description: Applies the [justify-content](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/justify-content) css property. Available options are: **start**, **center**, **end**, **space-between** and **space-around**.

attributes.name: justify-sm
attributes.description: Changes the **justify-content** property on small and greater breakpoints.

attributes.name: justify-md
attributes.description: Changes the **justify-content** property on medium and greater breakpoints.

attributes.name: justify-lg
attributes.description: Changes the **justify-content** property on large and greater breakpoints.

attributes.name: justify-xl
attributes.description: Changes the **justify-content** property on extra large and greater breakpoints.

attributes.name: align-content
attributes.description: Applies the [align-content](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/align-content) css property. Available options are: **start**, **center**, **end**, **space-between**, **space-around** and **stretch**.

attributes.name: align-content-sm
attributes.description: Changes the **align-content** property on small and greater breakpoints.

attributes.name: align-content-md
attributes.description: Changes the **align-content** property on medium and greater breakpoints.

attributes.name: align-content-lg
attributes.description: Changes the **align-content** property on large and greater breakpoints.

attributes.name: align-content-xl
attributes.description: Changes the **align-content** property on extra large and greater breakpoints.

attributes.name: tag
attributes.description: Specify a custom tag used on the root element.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Turns off hover functionality

attributes.name: left
attributes.description: Applies appropriate margins to the icon inside of a button when placed to the **left** of another element or text.

attributes.name: right
attributes.description: Applies appropriate margins to the icon inside of a button when placed to the **right** of another element or text.

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description: Designates a specific icon.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Sets the height and width of the component. Default unit is px. Can also use the following predefined sizes: **x-small**, **small**, **default**, **large**, and **x-large**.

attributes.name: tag
attributes.description: Specify a custom tag used on the root element.

attributes.name: aspect-ratio
attributes.description: Calculated as `width/height`, so for a 1920x1080px image this will be `1.7778`. Will be calculated automatically if omitted.

attributes.name: alt
attributes.description: Alternate text for screen readers. Leave empty for decorative images.

attributes.name: cover
attributes.description: Resizes the background image to cover the entire container.

attributes.name: eager
attributes.description: Will force the components content to render on mounted. This is useful if you have content that will not be rendered in the DOM that you want crawled for SEO.

attributes.name: lazy-src
attributes.description:
Something to show while waiting for the main image to load, typically a small base64-encoded thumbnail. Has a slight blur filter applied.

Use [vuetify-loader](https://github.com/vuetifyjs/vuetify-loader) to generate automatically.

attributes.name: options
attributes.description: Options that are passed to the [Intersection observer](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Intersection_Observer_API) constructor.

attributes.name: position
attributes.description: Overrides the default to change which parts get cropped off. Uses the same syntax as [`background-position`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/background-position).

attributes.name: sizes
attributes.description: For use with `srcset`, see [MDN](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/img#attr-sizes).

attributes.name: src
attributes.description: The image URL. This prop is mandatory.

attributes.name: srcset
attributes.description: A set of alternate images to use based on device size. [Read more...](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/img#attr-srcset).

attributes.name: transition
attributes.description: The transition to use when switching from `lazy-src` to `src`.

attributes.name: append-icon
attributes.description: Appends an icon to the component, uses the same syntax as `v-icon`

attributes.name: hide-details
attributes.description: Hides hint and validation errors. When set to `auto` messages will be rendered only if there's a message (hint, error message, counter value etc) to display

attributes.name: hide-spin-buttons
attributes.description: Hides spin buttons on the input when type is set to `number`.

attributes.name: hint
attributes.description: Hint text

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Sets input label

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: Displays linear progress bar. Can either be a String which specifies which color is applied to the progress bar (any material color or theme color - **primary**, **secondary**, **success**, **info**, **warning**, **error**) or a Boolean which uses the component **color** (set by color prop - if it's supported by the component) or the primary color

attributes.name: persistent-hint
attributes.description: Forces hint to always be visible

attributes.name: prepend-icon
attributes.description: Prepends an icon to the component, uses the same syntax as `v-icon`

attributes.name: theme
attributes.description: Specify a theme for this component and all of its children

attributes.name: density
attributes.description: Adjusts the spacing within the component. Available options are: **default**, **comfortable**, and **compact**.

events.name: click:prepend
events.description: Emitted when prepended icon is clicked

events.name: click:append
events.description: Emitted when appended icon is clicked

attributes.name: theme
attributes.description: Specify a theme for this component and all of its children

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The value used when the component is selected in a group. If not provided, a unique ID will be used.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Removes the ability to click or target the component.

attributes.name: selected-class
attributes.description: Configure the active CSS class applied when the item is selected.

attributes.name: model-value
attributes.description: Represents the selected item(s). Will be an array if **multiple** prop is used.

attributes.name: multiple
attributes.description: Allows one to select mulitple items.

attributes.name: mandatory
attributes.description: Forces at least one item to always be selected (if available).

attributes.name: max
attributes.description: Sets a maximum number of selections that can be made.

attributes.name: selected-class
attributes.description: Configure the selected CSS class. This class will be available in `v-item` default scoped slot.

attributes.name: tag
attributes.description: Specify a custom tag used on the root element.

attributes.name: theme
attributes.description: Specify a theme for this component and all of its children

events.name: update:modelValue
events.description: Emitted when selection changes

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Sets the height and width of the component.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables all children `v-list-item` components

attributes.name: lines
attributes.description: Designates a **minimum-height** for all children `v-list-item` components. This prop uses [line-clamp](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/-webkit-line-clamp) and is not supported in all browsers.

attributes.name: nav
attributes.description: An alternative styling that reduces `v-list-item` width and rounds the corners. Typically used with **[v-navigation-drawer](/components/navigation-drawers)**

attributes.name: subheader
attributes.description: Removes the top padding from `v-list-subheader` components. When used as a **String**, renders a subheader for you

attributes.name: border
attributes.description: Applies border styles to component.

attributes.name: density
attributes.description: Adjusts the spacing within the component. Available options are: **default**, **comfortable**, and **compact**.

attributes.description: Sets the height for the component.

attributes.description: Sets the maximum height for the component.

attributes.name: max-width
attributes.description: Sets the maximum width for the component.

attributes.name: min-height
attributes.description: Sets the minimum height for the component.

attributes.name: min-width
attributes.description: Sets the minimum width for the component.

attributes.name: width

attributes.name: elevation
attributes.description: Designates an elevation applied to the component between 0 and 24. You can find more information on the [elevation page](/styles/elevation).

attributes.name: active-color

attributes.name: active-class

vue-modifiers.name: once
vue-modifiers.description: Will only invoke the provided user callback on mount and once intersected. If using the **quiet** modifier will only invoke once.

vue-modifiers.name: quiet
vue-modifiers.description: Will not automatically invoke the provided callback on bind.

vue-modifiers.name: quiet
vue-modifiers.description: Will **not** automatically invoke the provided callback on bind.

vue-modifiers.name: #target
vue-modifiers.description: The target watched for scroll changes. Defaults to window but can be changed to any valid id selector.

vue-modifiers.name: self
vue-modifiers.description: Binds to the element that the the directive is attached.
